message:
fix: Use preprocessor macro to disable AVX-512 in libdeflate

- Replace failed -mno-evex512 flag with preprocessor macro
- Add -DLIBDEFLATE_ASSEMBLER_DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_AVX512VNNI
- This is libdeflate's official way to disable AVX-512 at compile-time
- CI runners can't compile AVX-512 code (missing evex512 feature)
- Still uses AVX2/SSE/scalar implementations (no performance loss)

The -mno-evex512 compiler flag from commit bc6025a4 didn't work.
Preprocessor macros are processed BEFORE compilation, preventing
AVX-512 code from being generated at all.

Fixes 40 compilation errors:
- '_mm512_set_epi64' requires target feature 'evex512'
- AVX vector return of type '__m512i' without 'evex512' changes ABI
